title: feat: add p0 admin operations safe health checks
goal: Add GET /admin/operations/health as an API-only safe health metadata endpoint for P0 admin operations.
rollbackOrStopCondition: Stop if package.json, pnpm-lock, contracts, migrations, workflows, scripts, apps/web, apps/overlay, real YouTube API, real OAuth, real RPC, real DB, DB driver dependency, Redis/Kafka dependency, wallet/RPC/deploy changes, or readiness/compliance claims are introduced.
doneCriteria: admin operations health requires admin bearer token
includes safe rate-limit config without raw key
excludes raw token and token fingerprint
excludes raw payload secrets stack stdout stderr logs_url jobs_url
existing admin operations summary tests still pass
existing admin DLQ visibility/redrive/audit/rate-limit tests still pass
securityBoundaries: No DB driver, Redis, or Kafka dependency is added.
No real DB connection is introduced.
No migration is changed or executed.
No real YouTube API or OAuth token is used.
No RPC, wallet, deploy, contracts, workflows, web, or overlay changes.
Raw admin token, token fingerprint, IP address, and user-agent are not returned.
No runtime, production, legal, or YouTube policy readiness is claimed.
residualRisks: This is local/internal safe health metadata only.
Web Admin Console readiness, production operations readiness, distributed metrics, durable analytics, and real retention policy remain future scoped work.
humanConfirmation: AI review is not human approval.
Merge remains blocked until same-head checks pass after evidence refresh.

packageVerification.verification: No package scripts, runtime dependencies, DB driver dependency, Redis/Kafka dependency, package.json, or pnpm-lock changes are introduced.

apiCompatibilitySummary.statement: Adds local/internal admin operations safe health metadata API.

runtimeSmokeRationale: No runtime readiness is claimed; this is local/internal admin operations safe health metadata only.

reviewScope.scope: P0 admin operations safe health checks, admin auth, endpoint availability metadata, safe rate-limit config, tests, docs, and .codex evidence.
reviewScope.riskSummary: Main risk is exposing token, fingerprint, request metadata, raw payloads, or implying readiness; tests and docs reject those outcomes.
reviewScope.verificationOracle: Admin operations health tests, existing admin operations summary tests, existing DLQ tests, full repository tests, evidence checks, quality self-protection, secret scan, and GitHub same-head checks.
